notes: v265 — 'Clear all filters' now really clears everything. Before, if you were in your watchlist or had quick stat chips active, clearing filters left you stuck in that view. Now the ↺ Clear all filters button also steps out of the watchlist view and switches off the quick chips (Gainers, Vol ≥200%, Accum?, etc.), returning you to the full share list in one tap. It still changes no data and fetches nothing — instant.
